name: EdwMPIIndvBeKeyXWalkRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS MIN_RUN_CYC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MPI' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE T SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.MIN_RUN_CYC AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
IdsEdwMbrRDSRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
